pet_policy: 2.5-acre dog park open to dogs of all sizes with an open field, drinking fountains, paved path and wooded area; pets are welcome on the Ironweed and Marsh Hawk trails on a leash no longer than 6 feet

pet_policy: 3-acre dog park for large dogs (20 pounds and over) plus a 1-acre dog park for small dogs in the Buckeye Area; pets are welcome on four designated pet trails on a leash no longer than 6 feet

pet_policy: Dogs may swim at the off-leash doggie beach in the Darby Bend Lakes area; pets are welcome on six designated pet trails on a leash no longer than 6 feet
